suite_name:
Verify the login functionity 
during login ckik on the login button

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page with a valid session
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username, password fields and a Login button
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user session is established (e.g., user name or avatar is visible in the header)
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login is successful as email fields are case-insensitive; user is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'TESTD1051@GMAIL.COM' in the username/email field (uppercase version of valid email)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user session is established
positive_scenarios.title: Login with email address containing uppercase letters

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Password characters are masked during input and login completes successfully
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Click on the password input field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Verify that the entered characters are masked (displayed as dots or asterisks)
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
positive_scenarios.title: Verify password field masks characters during input

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged in via keyboard submission and redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Press the 'Enter' key on the keyboard instead of clicking the Login button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user session is established
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login by pressing Enter key after entering credentials

positive_scenarios.expected_result: All UI elements are correctly rendered and functional; login completes successfully
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the page title or heading is displayed (e.g., 'Login' or 'Sign In')
Verify the username/email input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the 'Login' button is visible and clickable
Verify any additional links such as 'Forgot Password' or 'Sign Up' are visible
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify successful redirection to the dashboard
positive_scenarios.title: Verify login page elements and UI are correctly rendered

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session persists after page refresh; user remains logged in and on the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or Ctrl+R)
Verify the user is still on the dashboard/home page and not redirected back to the login page
Verify the authenticated user session is still active
positive_scenarios.title: Verify user remains logged in after page refresh post-login

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and validation error messages are shown for both empty username and password fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' button
Verify that the form is not submitted
Verify that appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Email is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails and an appropriate error message is displayed; user remains on the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid email and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails and an appropriate error message is displayed; user remains on the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'nonexistentuser@invalid.com' in the username/email field
Enter 'SomePassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed (e.g., 'User not found' or 'Invalid credentials')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/non-existent email and any password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and a validation error message is displayed for the missing username
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Leave the username/email field empty
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the empty username field (e.g., 'Email is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and valid password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked and a validation error message is displayed for the missing password
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed for the empty password field (e.g., 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is blocked due to invalid email format and an appropriate validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter 'invalidemail@' in the username/email field (invalid email format)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the form is not submitted
Verify a validation error message is displayed (e.g., 'Please enter a valid email address')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: SQL injection attempt is rejected; login fails and no unauthorized access is granted; application remains secure
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter ''' OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter 'anypassword' in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is NOT authenticated or redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message is displayed and no unauthorized access is granted
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login fails gracefully with a validation error for exceeding maximum input length; application does not crash
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed
Enter a string of 256+ characters in the username/email field (e.g., 'aaaaaa...aaaa@test.com' with 256 characters total)
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an appropriate error or validation message is displayed, or the input is truncated
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long username input (boundary value)
